citation.article_title: A semi-empirical backscattering model at L-band and C-band for a soybean canopy with soil moisture inversion
citation.author: Roo
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
citation.unstructured_citation: Roo, R. D. de, Du, Y., Ulaby, F. T., & Dobson, M. C. (2001). A semi-empirical backscattering model at L-band and C-band for a soybean canopy with soil moisture inversion. IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 39(4), 864–872. https://doi.org/10.1109/36.917912

citation.article_title: Measuring soil moisture with imaging radars
citation.author: Dubois
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
citation.unstructured_citation: Dubois, P. C., Zyl, J. van, & Engman, T. (1995). Measuring soil moisture with imaging radars. IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 33(4), 915–926. https://doi.org/10.1109/36.406677

citation.article_title: Microwave Dielectric Behavior of Wet Soil-Part II: Dielectric Mixing Models
citation.author: Dobson
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
citation.unstructured_citation: Dobson, M. C., Ulaby, F. T., Hallikainen, M. T., & El-rayes, M. A. (1985). Microwave Dielectric Behavior of Wet Soil-Part II: Dielectric Mixing Models. IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, GE-23(1), 35–46. https://doi.org/10.1109/TGRS.1985.289498

citation.article_title: Backscattering from a randomly rough dielectric surface
citation.author: Fung
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
citation.unstructured_citation: Fung, A. K., Li, Z., & Chen, K. S. (1992). Backscattering from a randomly rough dielectric surface. IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 30(2), 356–369. https://doi.org/10.1109/36.134085

citation.article_title: An empirical model and an inversion technique for radar scattering from bare soil surfaces
citation.author: Oh
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
citation.unstructured_citation: Oh, Y., Sarabandi, K., & Ulaby, F. T. (1992). An empirical model and an inversion technique for radar scattering from bare soil surfaces. IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 30(2), 370–381. https://doi.org/10.1109/36.134086

citation.article_title: Quantitative retrieval of soil moisture content and surface roughness from multipolarized radar observations of bare soil surfaces
citation.author: Oh
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing

citation.author: Weiß

citation.author: Attema

citation.article_title: RTM-Based Downscaling of Medium Resolution Soil Moisture Using Sentinel-1 Data Over Agricultural Fields
citation.author: Weiß
citation.journal_title: IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing
citation.unstructured_citation: Weiß, T., Jagdhuber, T., Ramsauer, T., Löw, A., & Marzahn, P. (2024). RTM-Based Downscaling of Medium Resolution Soil Moisture Using Sentinel-1 Data Over Agricultural Fields. IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing, 17, 15463–15479. https://doi.org/10.1109/JSTARS.2024.3448625
